title: cicca reticulata
intro: Cicca reticulata, also known as the 'cotton bush', is a shrub native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever and inflammation due to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Cicca reticulata include reducing blood pressure and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
